title: Claim status call closes safely when payer refuses information
success_criteria: The assistant keeps the request scoped to claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-REFUSAL.
The assistant accepts that the payer refuses to disclose claim information.
The assistant captures refusal reason or call reference when available.
The assistant does not pressure the representative for unnecessary PHI.

criteria: The transcript reaches a payer-refusal outcome for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-REFUSAL.
The assistant recognizes that no claim status will be provided on this call.
The assistant captures the refusal reason.
The assistant does not pressure the representative to disclose restricted information.
The assistant does not request unnecessary patient details.
The assistant handles the refusal without looping.
The assistant keeps tone neutral and task-focused.
The assistant summarizes refusal reason and reference.
The assistant closes safely without claiming claim status was obtained.

notes: Synthetic payer-refusal fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris from Cosentus checking status for claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-REFUSAL.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: We cannot release claim information on this line. You need to use the portal.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Understood. May I have a call reference for the refusal to provide status by phone?

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Use reference REF-REFUSAL-FOXTROT. The reason is portal-only status access.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. I have portal-only status access as the refusal reason with reference REF-REFUSAL-FOXTROT.
